zh.title: 币安币/美元技术分析：短线弱势震荡偏空
zh.content:
BNB/USD最新价629.27，24小时微跌0.05%，价格贴近当日低位，显示短线买盘动能不足。当前波动区间极窄，市场处于低成交、低方向性的整理阶段。

技术面看，价格低于SMA20的632.757，说明短期均线压制仍在。MACD为-2.14147，处于负值区间，暗示空头动能尚未完全释放；RSI缺失，需降低超买超卖判断权重。

支撑位关注629.16，若跌破可能下探626.50至625.00区域。阻力位先看629.67，进一步压力在632.75附近，只有放量站上该位，短线结构才有转强迹象。

交易上建议谨慎追空，适合等待区间突破后再操作。激进者可在629附近轻仓试探，止损放在628下方；稳健者等待站上632.75后再考虑顺势做多。

en.title: Binance Coin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
BNB/USD is trading almost flat at 629.27, with a minor 24-hour decline of 0.05%. The very tight high-low range of 629.67 to 629.16 shows limited volatility and a market waiting for stronger direction. Price remains below the SMA(20) at 632.76, suggesting short-term bearish pressure unless buyers reclaim that moving average.

The MACD reading of -2.14147 points to negative momentum, although the missing signal line limits confirmation. RSI data is unavailable, so overbought or oversold conditions cannot be assessed reliably. For now, momentum appears mildly bearish, but not aggressively so.

Immediate support sits near 629.16, followed by the 628.00 and 625.00 zones if sellers gain control. Resistance is near 629.67, then 632.76 at the SMA(20). A clean move above 633.00 could improve sentiment and open room toward 636.00–640.00.

Traders may consider waiting for a breakout rather than forcing entries inside this narrow range. Bulls would want confirmation above the SMA(20), while bears may look for weakness below 629.00. Risk management is important, as low volatility can quickly expand after consolidation.
